title: Escapade in Florence
writer: Edward Fenton, Maurice Tombragel, Bob Wehling
actors: Nino Castelnuovo, Elisa Cegani, Liana Del Balzo
plot: Escapade in Florence is a two-part episode of the Disneyland television show which was released theatrically in some countries. It was shot on location in Florence and Tuscan, Italy.
